_comment: Agent 5 always-on triage scope. Squad campaigns ONLY (Rémi ruling 2026-06-09). Scope = auto-discovery by campaign_name_prefixes (A3-*/A4-*, the Agent 3/4 naming convention) MERGED with the static list below. New waves are picked up automatically; the static list is the fallback if the Lemlist campaign-listing call fails, plus any campaign that needs monitoring despite an off-convention name. activity_field_map exists because Lemlist /activities payload field names must be verified on the first --dry-run; adjust the map, not the code.

campaigns.name: A3-2026-05-13-001 C1 | Yara EU bridge anchor
